items.markdown:
![Coimbatore to Ooty Taxi and Cab booking | Global Tourism](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05080514-1420-0139-0000-5f2838be1893:4)
Coimbatore to Ooty cabs typically cost `between ₹1,275 and ₹3,000+ for a one-way trip` (approx. 85-90 km, 3 hours) depending on the vehicle type (sedan, SUV, or tempo traveler) and service provider. Options include private, chauffeur-driven rentals with pickup from the airport or city center, featuring scenic routes through Coonoor.[[1]](https://www.savaari.com/coimbatore/coimbatore-to-ooty-cabs)[[2]](https://www.wticabs.com/outstation-cabs/coimbatore-to-ooty)[[3]](https://www.travel2ooty.com/faq/how-to-reach-ooty-from-coimbatore)

**Key Cab Services & Contact Information** 

- **[Savaari](https://www.google.com/search?q=Savaari&csui=3&hl=en&gl=IN&uule=w+CAIQICIFSW5kaWE&ved=2ahUKEwj1tsGsz6iUAxVmJkQIHTlGEewQgK4QegYIAQgAEAw):** Offers Hatchbacks, Sedans, and SUVs with one-way fares.
- **[WTicabs](https://www.google.com/search?q=WTicabs&csui=3&hl=en&gl=IN&uule=w+CAIQICIFSW5kaWE&ved=2ahUKEwj1tsGsz6iUAxVmJkQIHTlGEewQgK4QegYIAQgAEA4):** Provides verified Sedan/SUV, with fares often starting around ₹2,893.
- **[Red Taxi](https://www.google.com/search?q=Red+Taxi&csui=3&hl=en&gl=IN&uule=w+CAIQICIFSW5kaWE&ved=2ahUKEwj1tsGsz6iUAxVmJkQIHTlGEewQgK4QegYIAQgAEBA):** Available for booking, often used for outstation travel.
- **[Ooty Travels](https://www.google.com/search?q=Ooty+Travels&csui=3&hl=en&gl=IN&uule=w+CAIQICIFSW5kaWE&ved=2ahUKEwj1tsGsz6iUAxVmJkQIHTlGEewQgK4QegYIAQgCEAE):** Can be reached at 8778250488.[[1]](https://www.savaari.com/coimbatore/coimbatore-to-ooty-cabs)[[2]](https://www.wticabs.com/outstation-cabs/coimbatore-to-ooty)[[3]](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DJJnWIGtB-C/)[[4]](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DAkM5ktvxbP/)

**Common Routes and Tips** 

- **Route:** Coimbatore -> Mettupalayam -> Coonoor -> Ooty (most scenic).
- **Booking:** It is highly recommended to book your cab in advance, especially from the Coimbatore Airport.
- **Alternatives:** Buses (KSRTC, private) are available for ₹108+. Local taxis are available at the Ooty bus stand.[[1]](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DJJnWIGtB-C/)[[2]](https://www.travel2ooty.com/faq/how-to-reach-ooty-from-coimbatore)[[3]](https://www.easemytrip.com/bus/coimbatore-to-ooty-bus-tickets/)[[4]](https://www.tripadvisor.in/ShowTopic-g297679-i12969-k14320264-Taxi_car_driver_recommendation-Ooty_Udhagamandalam_The_Nilgiris_District_Tamil_Nadu.html)[[5]](https://chikucab.com/bangalore-airport-to-coimbatore-cabs.html)

**Commonly Used Vehicles** 

- AC Sedans (4 passengers)
- AC SUVs (6-7 passengers)
- Tempo Travelers (12+ passengers)[[1]](https://www.savaari.com/coimbatore/coimbatore-to-ooty-cabs)

**Approximate Pricing Structures** 

- **Budget:** ~₹1,275+ (Hatchback/Sedan)
- **Premium:** ~₹2,800 - ₹4,000+ (SUV/Innova)
- **Sightseeing Package:** ~₹3,999 for full-day packages[[1]](https://www.savaari.com/coimbatore/coimbatore-to-ooty-cabs)[[2]](https://www.wticabs.com/outstation-cabs/coimbatore-to-ooty)[[3]](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DMxrSIZICdP/)

Ensure you confirm if the fare includes tolls, parking, and driver allowances.[[1]](https://www.wticabs.com/outstation-cabs/coimbatore-to-ooty)[[2]](https://www.savaari.com/coimbatore/coimbatore-to-ooty-cabs)

Options include private, chauffeur-driven rentals with pickup from the airport or city center, featuring scenic routes through Coonoor. Savaari +2

Botanical Garden: ₹50 per person.

Doddabetta Peak:₹20 per person.
Tea Factory & Museum:₹20 per person.
Pykara Waterfalls & Lake:₹50 per person.

expanded_element.description: Uber (or similar) does not work in Ooty. You will find cars with drivers just outside the bus stand. Touts may also approach you as soon as your bus arrives. You can find autorickshaws for local (within Ooty town) trips.
